documents.issuing_authority: CIPC — Companies and Intellectual Property Commission
documents.notes: Primary company registration document. Confirms active status. Required for FICA entity verification of the Pty Ltd.

Confirms directors and managing director of the company. FICA requires verification of all directors as natural persons. CoR39 may be stale if directors changed — should be verified against current CIPC records.

expiry_assessment.notes: Certified copy dated 2026-02-10. As of 2026-04-06 this is approximately 55 days old — within the standard 3-month certification validity window.

documents.coverage: Covers Francois Du Toit in all roles: Managing Director of company, Trustee and Founder of trust.
documents.notes: Valid certified copy. ID number matches CoR39 and Letters of Authority — consistent across documents.

documents.issuing_authority: Master of the High Court — Western Cape Division
documents.legal_basis: Section 6(1) of the Trust Property Control Act 57 of 1988

expiry_assessment.notes: Letters of Authority do not expire unless trustees change. However, these were issued in 2010 (16 years ago). Best practice is to confirm no trustee changes have occurred since issue. If trustees have changed, a fresh Letters of Authority reflecting current trustees must be obtained.

documents.notes: Required FICA document for trust entity verification. Confirms trust exists, is registered with the Master of the High Court, and names authorised trustees.

documents.document_source: City of Stellenbosch Municipality — Municipal Rates Account

expiry_assessment.notes: Document is dated 2025-09-30. As of 2026-04-06 this is 188 days old — exceeds the standard FICA requirement of not older than 3 months (90 days). File itself notes it is 'more than 6 months ago'.

documents.action_required: REPLACE — obtain a current utility bill, municipal rates statement, or bank statement not older than 3 months.

documents.beneficiaries: The Du Toit family and their descendants
documents.ownership_link: Trust holds 100% of shares in STELLENBOSCH WINE ESTATES (PTY) LTD (Reg: 2015/234567/07)
documents.notes: Critical document establishing the trust and its link to the company. Confirms the ownership chain: trust owns 100% of the Pty Ltd. This document is the instrument that FICA examiners use to trace beneficial ownership through the trust to the natural persons behind it.

memorandum_of_incorporation.issue: MOI (CoR15.1A or equivalent) not provided — may be required for full FICA compliance

share_register_or_shareholder_proof.issue: No share register or proof of shareholding by trust provided — important to formally confirm trust is shareholder

letters_of_authority.caveat: Issued 2010 — confirm no trustee changes since issue
